dct_title_s: Working Plan for Grading and Drainage of Main Quadrangle and Adjacent Roads.  F.L. & J.C. Olmsted, Landscape Architects
dct_description_sm: Oversize; Showing complete inner quad? and portion of projected outer quad in schematic drawing.  Outline of blocks for lateral quads.  Slightly different quad, Serra Street plans.
dct_rights_sm: Property rights reside with the repository. Literary rights reside with  the creators of the documents or their heirs. To obtain permission to publish or reproduce, please contact the Public Services Librarian of the Dept. of Special Collections (http://library.stanford.edu/spc).
